description: Pack an unpacked Office XML directory tree back into an Office workbook (.xlsx/.docx/.pptx), condensing XML whitespace.
rules: condenses XML (strips insignificant whitespace + comments) then ZIP-deflates the tree into the workbook
validation/auto-repair runs only for .docx/.pptx with an --original reference; for .xlsx it is skipped
this porter disables validation (--validate false) so no schema files are needed
packed workbook written under record_store as OUT_FILE; a JSON summary is written to pack.json
usage: Set PACK_DIR (an unpacked Office XML directory, e.g. from the unpack perk) and OUT_FILE (workbook basename, e.g. out.xlsx). Output: pack.json (summary) + record_store/<OUT_FILE>.
limitation: Requires defusedxml. Output extension must be .xlsx/.docx/.pptx. Without defusedxml the perk still emits valid JSON but produces no workbook. Round-trips an existing unpacked tree; it does not author a workbook from scratch.
